queries.question: Provide onboard services and entertainment offered on Boeing 787 Dreamliners.
queries.sql:
SELECT Onboard_Services.service_name as name
FROM Aircraft JOIN Onboard_Services ON Aircraft.id = Onboard_Services.Aircraft_id
WHERE Aircraft.Name = "Boeing 787 Dreamliner"
UNION
SELECT Inflight_Entertainments.entertainment_name as name
FROM Aircraft JOIN Inflight_Entertainments ON Aircraft.id = Inflight_Entertainments.Aircraft_id
WHERE Aircraft.Name = "Boeing 787 Dreamliner"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?aircraft a :Aircraft .
    ?onboard_services a :OnboardServices .
    ?onboard_services p:hasAircraft ?aircraft .
    ?onboard_services p:Service_name ?service_name .
    ?aircraft p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Boeing 787 Dreamliner")
    BIND(?service_name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?aircraft a :Aircraft .
    ?inflight_entertainments a :InflightEntertainments .
    ?inflight_entertainments p:hasAircraft ?aircraft .
    ?inflight_entertainments p:Entertainment_name ?entertainment_name .
    ?aircraft p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Boeing 787 Dreamliner")
    BIND(?entertainment_name AS ?o0)
  }
}
